creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
(In reply to Alexander Vereeken from comment #1)

I now installed emulators/wine and then run these as advertised:

% /usr/local/share/wine/pkg32.sh install wine mesa-dri
% /usr/local/share/wine/pkg32.sh upgrade

I get exactly the same results with emulators/wine version as described for the emulators/i386-wine-devel version in my first message here.

Regards.
